name: Far View Golf Range & Club Repair
address: N 5709 St Marie Rd, Green Lake, WI 54941
about: Far View Golf Range & Club Repair is a golf practice facility located in Green Lake, Wisconsin. The venue offers standard golf range amenities and club repair services. As a PGA-affiliated location, it provides access to resources through the PGA of America network. The facility serves both individual golfers and those seeking equipment services, though detailed information on simulator technology and premium amenities is not readily available from the provided content.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA affiliation for credibility and resources

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs as there is no mention of club rentals available for simulator use.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, there is no mention of outside food or drink policies in the provided information.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Information on typical 18-hole simulation times is not available from the provided content.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility appears to be kid-friendly as it offers coaching services and is described as a community-oriented golf range.
